message:
fix: eliminate proptest global-reject risk in union_find and fenwick_tree (ft-2zosz)

Replace prop_assume! index filters with fraction-based index generation
to prevent "Too many global rejects" when collection size is small:
- proptest_union_find.rs: 7 tests fixed (symmetric, transitive, union,
  commutative, decrements, size_matches, reset_disconnects)
- proptest_fenwick_tree.rs: 4 tests fixed (range_sum_single, additivity,
  set_then_query, set_isolated)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
